events.summary: Phase 0 Research opened. Reconciling the 2026-04-28 signature-expansion note (pre-experiment, static-TOPS-profile-focused) with the now-CONFIRMED Phase 2-bis empirical streaming-signature results. Isolated worktree off origin/main.
Phase 0 Research approved (Approach B empirical-first). Reachable-now substrates: cloud/API endpoints + operator M-series Macs (ollama) + iPhone A-series; Snapdragon/Intel/AMD → harness+priors.
Phase 1 PRD opened after Phase 0 approval. has_ui=false (integration spec, not UX). Scope: calibratable-now surface + on-device harness + tagged priors + §5 schema additions.
Phase 1 PRD approved. Hardware locked: current machine M4 (D4); iPhone 14 Pro = A16 Bionic (D5). M4 calibration also serves K2 generalization check (Sub-exp 2 was M2).
Phase 2 Tasks opened. 9 tasks: T1 schema v1.1 (foundation) → T2 reader/attester → T3 harness → T4 M4 calib → T5 A16 path → T6 cloud calib → T7 priors → T8 tests/no-regression → T9 docs.
Phase 2 Tasks approved (9 tasks). Operator chose full integration spec before implementation.
Phase 3b Integration spec opened (has_ui=false). Nails the schema v1.1 contract for 3 files + reader/attester behavior + harness I/O contract + migration + backward-compat before any code.

Integration spec written. Reality-check: v1.1 scaffolding (24 profiles, precisions[], compute_axes, vendor_status, enums) ALREADY shipped by prior session. Real delta narrowed to per-row calibration_status (instrumented|prior_unvalidated) across 3 files + reference class field + reader/attester guardrail + on-device harness + migration.
